indicators.name: no bed
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed is a significant barrier to sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture
indicators.rationale: The lack of furniture makes the space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No windows prevent natural light and ventilation.

indicators.name: no curtains
indicators.rationale: No curtains prevent light control and privacy.

indicators.name: no lighting
indicators.rationale: No lighting makes the space unsuitable for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for sleep (primary). There is no bed, no furniture, no windows, no curtains, and no lighting, making it impossible to support the activity.
